###### HOUSE CASTERLY (id = dynn_Casterly)
############################
### As Firm as Rock
###
Casterly_1 = {
	name = Caster # Canon
	dynasty = dynn_Casterly

	religion = old_gods_wnw
	culture = first_man

	trait = education_stewardship_4
	trait = education_martial_prowess_3
	trait = compassionate
	trait = generous
	trait = brave
	trait = bossy

	disallow_random_traits = yes

	1200.1.1 = {
		birth = yes
		add_character_flag = canon_status_canon
	}
	1260.1.1 = { death = yes }
}
Casterly_2 = {
	name = Corlos # Canon, the first Casterly to mine from Casterly Rock

		trait = lifestyle_hunter

	}

}

###### HOUSE LANNISTER (id = dynn_Lannister)

### Hear me Roar

### Pre-Andal Kings
############################
Lannister_29 = {
	name = Lann # Canon, AKA: Lann the Clever
	dynasty = dynn_Lannister
	dna = Lannister_29

	religion = old_gods_wnw
	culture = first_man

	trait = education_intrigue_4
	trait = intellect_good_3
	trait = deceitful
	trait = greedy

	give_nickname = nick_agot_historical_the_clever

	2008.1.1 = {
		birth = yes
		make_trait_inactive = emerald_eyes
		make_trait_inactive = gold_hair
		make_trait_inactive = scripted_appearance
		add_character_flag = canon_status_canon
	}
	2026.1.1 = { add_spouse = Casterly_8 } # Castella Casterly
	2320.1.1 = { death = yes } # Legends say he died at the age of 312
}
Lannister_30 = {
	name = Loreon # Canon, Loreon I, The Lion, first King of the Rock
	dynasty = dynn_Lannister

	martial = 10

	religion = old_gods_wnw
	culture = first_man

	father = Lannister_29
	mother = Casterly_8

	trait = education_martial_4
	trait = intellect_good_3
	trait = callous
	trait = diligent

	2303.1.1 = {
		birth = yes
		make_trait_inactive = emerald_eyes
		make_trait_inactive = gold_hair
		add_character_flag = canon_status_canon
	}
	2335.1.1 = { add_spouse = Reyne_2 } # Reyna Reyne
	2340.1.1 = {
		trait = brave
		trait = patient
		trait = lifestyle_blademaster
		add_trait_xp = {
			trait = lifestyle_blademaster
			value = trait_third_level
		}
		give_nickname = nick_agot_historical_the_lion_Lannister_30
	}
	2380.1.1 = { death = yes }
}

	father = Lannister_55

	trait = trusting
	trait = charming

		birth = yes
		make_trait_inactive = emerald_eyes

###### HOUSE LANNETT (id = house_Lannett )

### Fruit On The Tree
###
Lannett_9 = {
	name = Line_of_Lannett
	dynasty_house = house_Lannett

	religion = fots_seven
	culture = westerman_main

	father = Lannister_29 # Lann the Clever
